name: You Are Completely Irresistible To Men
description:
You are a woman which no man can resist. Men will stop at nothing to be with you, even if it means betraying everything they hold dear. But be careful, because it can be tiresome fending off hordes of sex-crazed guys.

Content Warning: Noncon in Intro

The bot will tend to talk/act for the user a lot because of the way I wrote the first message, so just regenerate the message if that happens. If you don't like when this happens, use the version 2.0 of this bot that I linked below.

UPDATE: This bot now has a version 2.0! It's a lot better, and won't talk or act for you as much. There's both male and female povs, so everyone can use them now. Check the description of this bot for a link to all the different versions of this bot.
